item.title: Privacy Policy
item.description:
This Privacy Policy explains how the Exponential Individuals community collects, uses, discloses, and protects information when visitors access exponentialindividuals.io, including during pre-orders and purchases.

By using this Website, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this Privacy Policy.

1. Information We Collect

Personal Information

When interacting with the Website, making purchases, or signing up for updates, you may provide:

  • Name
  • Email address
  • Billing and shipping address
  • Payment information (processed securely by third parties)
  • Order details

Automatically Collected Information

The site automatically collects:

item.title: Terms & Conditions
item.description:
1. About This Website

This Website is operated by the Exponential Individuals community (referred to as “we,” “us,” or “our”). The Website is used to provide information about The Exponential Individual Playbook and to facilitate the sale and pre-order of books and related products.

2. Pre-Orders

By placing a pre-order through this Website, you acknowledge and agree that:

  • Pre-orders are charged at the time of purchase unless otherwise stated.
  • The release date provided is an estimate and may change due to circumstances beyond our control.
  • We reserve the right to update delivery timelines and will communicate any significant changes via email.

3. Pre-Order Bonuses

From time to time, we may offer bonuses or incentives for customers who pre-order the book. Bonuses may be digital or physical and are subject to change or availability. Delivery of bonuses may occur separately from the book itself. Bonuses are non-transferable and may not be exchanged for cash.
